sections.paragraph:
verb לאפוס

to run out, exhausted, cease

verb לאפס

to nullify; set to zero; st, zero

verb אופס

be nullified; be set to zero; sted

verb להתאפס

become equal to zero; to vanish

verb לאפס (>>איפס)

to nullify; set to zero; st, zero

noun

zero, naught, nought, nil, nihil, scratch, zilch

adverb

but

noun

insignificant person
